CustomField.description: The calculated trustee variable fees for this insolvency
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT(Insolvency_Type__c) == 'Consumer Proposal' || TEXT(Insolvency_Type__c) == 'Division 1 Proposal', ( ( ( Payment_Amount__c * Number_of_Payments__c ) + Bulk_Payment_Amount__c ) - $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Trustee_Administration_Fee__c - $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Counselling_Fee__c - $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Receiver_Fee__c ) * $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Trustee_Variable_Fee_Rate__c, null)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The calculated trustee variable fees for this insolvency
CustomField.label: Trustee Variable Fees
